# format: html5-dom-v2

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="title" attrs=[]
        "Create account"
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      "\n"
      element ns=html local="section" attrs=[]
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="h1" attrs=[]
          "Create your account"
        "\n"
        element ns=html local="form" attrs=[]
          "\n"
          element ns=html local="input" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="name" value="name"}, {ns=none prefix=- local="placeholder" value="Name"}]
          "\n"
          element ns=html local="input" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="name" value="company"}, {ns=none prefix=- local="placeholder" value="Company"}]
          "\n"
          element ns=html local="label" attrs=[]
            element ns=html local="input" attrs=[{ns=none prefix=- local="type" value="checkbox"}, {ns=none prefix=- local="name" value="terms"}]
            "I agree to terms"
          "\n"
          element ns=html local="button" attrs=[]
            "Create account"
          "\n"
        "\n"
      "\n"
